_comment: Pact policy configuration for the WalletProvider. Keyed by CHAIN_ID, same as config/networks.json. Holds function selectors (static), tribute cap, CAW chain identifier mapping, and completion conditions. Contract ADDRESSES are NOT here — they live in config/networks.json and are resolved via src/shared/network_config.py. This file is the Pact-spec template; WalletProvider combines addresses (from network_config) + selectors (from here) into the CAW target_in allowlist.
